content:
With these small adjustments, your application materials will be even stronger. Keep up the good work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 80/100
• Resume: 85/100

⸻

Letter for Ashley Hardie

Dear Ashley,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together a strong application, and I appreciate the effort you’ve put into your materials. Below is my feedback on both.

Your cover letter is structured well and has a professional tone. However, one area that could be improved is the customization—it would be great to see more specifics about why you are interested in this particular role and company. Right now, the letter covers your qualifications but doesn’t fully tie them to the company’s mission or needs. Additionally, while your introduction is clear, making it more engaging could strengthen your letter overall.

Your resume is well-organized and presents your skills and experience in a professional manner. One area for improvement is your work experience section—adding more detailed bullet points to show exactly what you accomplished in each role would help. Employers like to see quantifiable achievements, such as specific improvements you made or measurable results from your work. Additionally, ensure that formatting is consistent throughout, particularly with spacing and punctuation.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 9 (chunk 9/22)
